# Coconuts Beach Bar

> Coconuts Beach Bar at Apokrousi Beach, Kythnos. Premium beach bar with food, cocktails, sunbeds, and crystal-clear turquoise waters. Family-friendly, safe, and unforgettable.

## Pages

- [https://coconutsbeachbar.gr/](https://coconutsbeachbar.gr/)
